title: AI Engineer
company_focus: Medically-tuned AI platform for life sciences and pharma
description:
COMPANY SUMMARY

Sorcero's medically-tuned intelligence platform transforms
life sciences decision-making, accelerating patient access
to life-saving treatments. By harnessing insights from
global medical data, we empower industry leaders to deliver
breakthrough therapies. Founded in 2018 by pioneers in AI,
public health, and personalized content, Sorcero is a
Certified B Corp headquartered in Washington, DC. Our
innovation has been recognized by over a dozen awards,
including Fast Company's Most Innovative companies of 2024,
and six foundational medical AI patents. For more
information, visit www.Sorcero.com.

WHY JOIN SORCERO?

Our growth and success by collaborating with our network of
passionate entrepreneurs to build a scalable, impactful
organization. From flexible working arrangements to
encouraging meaningful interactions with teammates across
the globe, Sorcero provides a supportive community to bring
out the best in each of us.

Our employees are driven by these common values:

- Pursuit of excellence and mastery of their craft
- Humility in defeat and in success
- Kindness and empathy towards others
- Desire to create large-scale, positive change

Sorcero builds AI powered solutions, combining the power of
deep learning with the accuracy of ontologies to drive
natural language understanding.  Top Pharma companies,
scientists and researchers use our platform and
applications.

THE ROLE

We are looking for an AI Engineer with experience in
enterprise SaaS environments, with a focus on Generative AI
and Data Science skills. The ideal candidate will have
experience leading cross-functional product teams designing,
building, and training AI-powered services for processing
complex data in the life sciences domain.

You will tackle some of our most critical AI challenges:

- Collaborating with subject matter experts and cross-
  functional product teams to design and build robust
  pipelines using cloud infrastructure for ingesting and
  processing both structured and unstructured data from
  diverse life sciences sources.
- Developing and implementing transparent and explainable AI
  systems that maintain scientific accuracy while delivering
  insights that medical professionals can trust and act
  upon.
- Creating domain-specific AI solutions that can address the
  complexity of medical and scientific language with high
  precision, balancing the power of cutting-edge AI with the
  need for regulatory compliance and scientific rigor in
  healthcare applications.

The primary languages, services, and frameworks that the
candidate would be expected to work with frequently: Python,
Jupyter Notebooks, pytest, Poetry, PostgreSQL, Big Query,
Vertex AI, Google Cloud Storage, PyTorch, and LLMs within
Google's Model Garden. Sorcero is an agile startup on the
bleeding edge of current AI advancements, including LLMs,
RAG and Agentic Frameworks. Experience with deploying and
maintaining LLM-based systems and frameworks used for them
(such as LangChain and LlamaIndex) is a bonus, as is the
ability to learn new technologies quickly.

The ideal candidate will be a collaborative team player who
can lead execution to build innovative AI solutions. You
will be expected to contribute to the decision-making
process and influence the design of our services, bringing
initiative and a positive, collaborative attitude.
Communication skills are critical, as AI engineers are the
ambassadors of good AI practices throughout Sorcero.

Keep in mind - this is a challenging domain. We make
decisions fast, based on scientific facts, using advanced
custom technology. We are not building standard, ordinary
applications. Our products are innovative and so is our
team. This is a great opportunity for someone looking to
contribute meaningfully and learn while having fun in the
process.

RESPONSIBILITIES

- AI Model Development: Collaborate with the AI and MLOps
  teams to create, train and test models that deliver our AI
  capabilities with a focus on scientific accuracy and
  domain relevance, enabling new solutions for our
  customers, as well as our enterprise SaaS product
  offerings.
- Strong Leadership Focused on Excellence: Lead agile teams of
  fellow engineers, product managers, and SMEs to execute
  aiming for excellence in engineering while managing
  uncertainty, communicating effectively and driving cross-
  functional clarity and value creation.
- Explainable AI Development: Build AI systems with
  transparency and explainability at their core, allowing
  users to understand how and why specific conclusions are
  reached—critical for life sciences applications where
  trustworthiness is paramount
- Product Understanding: Understand our products from both the
  customer perspective and the engineering perspective.
- AI Advocacy: Actively advocate for improving AI best
  practices, both internally in the tools and services
  offered by the AI team, as well as externally in the way
  the product teams integrate against those services.

PERFORMANCE INDICATORS

Success in this role will be measured by:

- Ability to lead fellow engineers to develop accurate,
  scalable, and explainable AI solutions that directly
  address customer needs
- Reduction in processing time for complex scientific datasets
  while maintaining or improving accuracy
- Quality of integration between AI systems and product
  features as measured by customer satisfaction
- Contributions to our AI toolkit that enable other teams to
  build more efficiently
- Demonstrated ability to balance innovation with production
  stability in deployed AI systems

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS:

- 3+ years of enterprise SaaS software development experience
- 3+ years of Python experience
- 3+ years of experience with cloud computing (GCP preferred)
- Experience with Large Language Models
- Experience with common Data Science tooling and packages
- A positive and collaborative attitude
- Initiative and self-motivation
- Motivation and drive to continuously improve and learn by
  trying new tools, processes, or methodologies
- Excellent verbal and written communication skills
- Company-provided laptop and hardware

COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS

Sorcero is a remote and globally distributed team. We offer
rewarding compensation that will include a base salary in
the range of $150,000-$180,000 depending on experience.

We also provide the following benefits:

- Three weeks PTO + 1 week of December holiday recess
- One week Safe & Sick leave
- 10 company holidays + 2 floating holidays
- Medical, dental and vision benefits for you and your family
- Paid parental bonding leave
- 401(k) retirement plan, company match up to 5%
- Company-provided laptop and hardware

Because ∑ (human + AI) > human or AI alone

Sorcero is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We do not
discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national
origin, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender
expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age,
education, status as a protected veteran, status as an
individual with a disability, or other applicable legally
protected characteristics. and celebrates the diversity of
its growing team.

We are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of
employment Visa at this time.
responsibilities: Collaborate with AI and MLOps teams to create, train, and test models focusing on scientific accuracy and domain relevance
Lead agile teams of engineers, product managers, and SMEs to execute on engineering excellence
Build transparent and explainable AI systems for life sciences applications where trustworthiness is paramount
Design and build robust pipelines using cloud infrastructure for ingesting structured and unstructured data
Develop domain-specific AI solutions that address medical and scientific language complexity while maintaining regulatory compliance
Advocate for AI best practices internally across tools and services, and externally for product team integration
use_cases: Processing complex structured and unstructured data from diverse life sciences sources
Delivering insights to medical professionals that they can trust and act upon
Addressing medical and scientific language complexity with high precision in healthcare applications
Accelerating patient access to life-saving treatments through improved decision-making
Empowering top Pharma companies, scientists, and researchers with AI-powered natural language understanding
ai_classification_reasoning:
Role involves hands-on work building, training, and
deploying AI models including LLMs, RAG systems, and agentic
frameworks. The engineer will develop explainable AI
systems, implement LLM-based solutions using frameworks like
LangChain and LlamaIndex, and work directly with PyTorch and
Google's Model Garden. This is active model development and
deployment, not just infrastructure support.
